title: polystichum eximium
intro: Polystichum eximium, also known as the New Zealand fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polystichum eximium include its ability to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation, making it a popular remedy for wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or ointment, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
